media_scenes.title: Morning at Central district in Bengaluru
media_scenes.prompt: A photorealistic premium travel scene in Bengaluru featuring Central district in Bengaluru in central area during the 09:00 to 11:30 part of the itinerary. Reflect a balanced trip style, cool or cold season context. shorter daylight and heavier outerwear may matter. Show realistic crowd density, subtle local atmosphere, and activities connected to food, culture.
style_rules: Photorealistic travel photography with cinematic composition.
Keep landmarks geographically plausible and avoid fantasy elements.
Show season, weather, time of day, and crowd level consistent with the itinerary context.
Use natural lighting and a premium editorial travel aesthetic.
Do not include text overlays, logos, watermarks, or collage layouts.
